admin.auto_restart.description: Schedule daily restart times so the community can plan around predictable restart windows.
admin.auto_restart.discord_reminder_desc: How far ahead Discord gets an early heads up notification.
admin.auto_restart.enable_description: When enabled, the server will restart at the scheduled daily times.
admin.auto_restart.no_times: No restart times configured. Add one below.
admin.auto_restart.schedule_description: Add up to 5 daily restart times. Times are in :timezone.
admin.auto_restart.settings_description: Configure automatic server restarts with in-game countdown warnings and Discord reminders.
admin.auto_restart.timezone_description: Scheduled times are interpreted in this timezone.
admin.auto_restart.title: Auto Restart
admin.auto_restart.warning_message_descr: Custom label for countdown warnings. Default: "restart (automatic)"
admin.auto_restart.warning_time_descript: How long before the restart to start sending in-game countdown warnings.
admin.backups.bulk_delete_dialog_descrip: Permanently delete :count selected backups? This cannot be undone.
admin.backups.card_description: Server world saves with rollback support
admin.backups.create_dialog_description: Create a manual backup of the current server state.
admin.backups.delete_dialog_description: Permanently delete :filename? This cannot be undone.
admin.backups.import_confirm_label: I understand this will stop the server and overwrite save data
admin.backups.import_dialog_description: Upload a zip file containing PZ world save data. The server will be stopped automatically, a safety backup created, the save extracted, and the server restarted.
admin.backups.import_help_intro: On your existing PZ server, find the Zomboid data folder. Zip the contents using one of these layouts:
admin.backups.import_help_toggle: How to create the zip file
admin.backups.import_option1_description: Zip the Server/, Saves/, and db/ folders together. This imports config, world, and whitelist.
admin.backups.import_option2_description: Zip just the Saves/ folder. Config and whitelist stay unchanged.
admin.backups.import_option3_description: Zip the contents of the save folder directly (map files, players.db at the root of the zip).
admin.backups.import_version_warning: The server is running v:version. Ensure the imported save is compatible with this version. Importing a save from a different game version may cause the server to fail to start.
admin.backups.import_warning_description: A pre-import safety backup is created automatically. The server will restart after import completes. Players will be disconnected during this process.
admin.backups.import_warning_title: This will stop the server and overwrite save data
admin.backups.notification_message_place: Backup in progress — expect a brief lag
admin.backups.rollback_dialog_descriptio: This will stop the server, restore from :filename, and restart it. A pre-rollback safety backup will be created automatically.
admin.backups.switch_branch_label: Also switch to :branch branch after rollback
admin.backups.title: Backup Management
admin.backups.toast_backup_started: Backup started — it will appear in the list shortly
admin.backups.toast_network_error: Network error — could not reach the server
admin.backups.version_mismatch_descripti: This backup was created on v:backup_version (:backup_branch), but the server is currently running v:current_version (:current_branch). The save may not load correctly on a different game version.
admin.backups.warning_message_placeholde: Server rolling back — you will be disconnected...
